## Feature summary

Describe the feature.

## User problem

What founder/operator problem does this solve?

## Proposed solution

Explain the desired behavior.

## Suggested area

- [ ] Public site
- [ ] Free GPT
- [ ] GPT Actions API
- [ ] Calculator
- [ ] Funding readiness scoring
- [ ] Cash flow forecasting
- [ ] Expense leak detection
- [ ] Scenario modeling
- [ ] Founder OS
- [ ] Advisor Desk
- [ ] Templates/docs
- [ ] Integrations
- [ ] Other:

## Inputs needed

What data would the user provide?

## Output expected

What should CFO-in-a-Box return or display?

## Compliance considerations

- [ ] Does not require guaranteed funding language.
- [ ] Does not require underwriting decisions.
- [ ] Does not require tax, legal, accounting, investment, securities, or lending approval advice.
- [ ] Can separate known data from assumptions.

## Auth / integration needs

- [ ] No auth needed.
- [ ] API key auth may be needed later.
- [ ] OAuth may be needed later.
- [ ] Unsure.

## Additional context

Add mockups, examples, or notes. Do not include secrets or real client financial data.
